# === Force Manage (14:30 ET) ===

# §18(A) amendment 2026-04-13: CEO-approved early manage for unlimited-risk
46 9 * * 1-5 cd /home/mayongtao/projects/nodeble-strangle && NODEBLE_STRANGLE_HOME=/home/mayongtao/.nodeble-strangle /home/mayongtao/projects/nodeble-strangle/.venv/bin/python -m nodeble_strangle --mode manage >> /home/mayongtao/.nodeble-strangle/logs/cron.log 2>&1
# nodeble-strangle cron schedule — FROZEN per SPEC §5 / CLAUDE.md §18(A).
#
# Placeholders substituted at install time by deploy/deploy.sh:
#   /home/mayongtao/projects/nodeble-strangle            repo root, e.g. /home/mayongtao/projects/nodeble-strangle
#   /home/mayongtao/projects/nodeble-strangle/.venv                   virtualenv root, e.g. /home/mayongtao/projects/nodeble-strangle/.venv
#   /home/mayongtao/.nodeble-strangle/logs                log dir, typically $NODEBLE_STRANGLE_HOME/logs
#   /home/mayongtao/.nodeble-strangle  state/config dir, typically $HOME/.nodeble-strangle
#
# Cron slots (ET, Mon-Fri):
#   13:41 — signal
#   13:51 — manage
#   14:01 — scan
#   14:34 — manage --force
#
# Do NOT edit slots; the orchestrator and sibling modules coordinate on
# these exact minutes. Any change requires CEO approval (CLAUDE.md §18(A)).

41 13 * * 1-5 cd /home/mayongtao/projects/nodeble-strangle && NODEBLE_STRANGLE_HOME=/home/mayongtao/.nodeble-strangle /home/mayongtao/projects/nodeble-strangle/.venv/bin/python -m nodeble_strangle --mode signal >> /home/mayongtao/.nodeble-strangle/logs/cron.log 2>&1
51 13 * * 1-5 cd /home/mayongtao/projects/nodeble-strangle && NODEBLE_STRANGLE_HOME=/home/mayongtao/.nodeble-strangle /home/mayongtao/projects/nodeble-strangle/.venv/bin/python -m nodeble_strangle --mode manage >> /home/mayongtao/.nodeble-strangle/logs/cron.log 2>&1
01 14 * * 1-5 cd /home/mayongtao/projects/nodeble-strangle && NODEBLE_STRANGLE_HOME=/home/mayongtao/.nodeble-strangle /home/mayongtao/projects/nodeble-strangle/.venv/bin/python -m nodeble_strangle --mode scan >> /home/mayongtao/.nodeble-strangle/logs/cron.log 2>&1
34 14 * * 1-5 cd /home/mayongtao/projects/nodeble-strangle && NODEBLE_STRANGLE_HOME=/home/mayongtao/.nodeble-strangle /home/mayongtao/projects/nodeble-strangle/.venv/bin/python -m nodeble_strangle --mode manage --force >> /home/mayongtao/.nodeble-strangle/logs/cron.log 2>&1

# nodeble_collar cron — module #9
# Times in ET, weekdays only. Each line invokes `deploy/run-with-fresh-code.sh`
# which git-pulls origin/main before exec'ing the module, so PR merges land on
# the next cron tick without manual SSH. See deploy/run-with-fresh-code.sh
# header for failure-mode policy (log WARNING + continue on pull fail).
# Placeholders /home/mayongtao/projects/nodeble-collar / /home/mayongtao/.nodeble-collar/logs substituted by deploy.sh.
43 13 * * 1-5 /home/mayongtao/projects/nodeble-collar/deploy/run-with-fresh-code.sh signal       >> /home/mayongtao/.nodeble-collar/logs/cron.log 2>&1  # nodeble-collar
53 13 * * 1-5 /home/mayongtao/projects/nodeble-collar/deploy/run-with-fresh-code.sh manage       >> /home/mayongtao/.nodeble-collar/logs/cron.log 2>&1  # nodeble-collar
03 14 * * 1-5 /home/mayongtao/projects/nodeble-collar/deploy/run-with-fresh-code.sh scan         >> /home/mayongtao/.nodeble-collar/logs/cron.log 2>&1  # nodeble-collar
36 14 * * 1-5 /home/mayongtao/projects/nodeble-collar/deploy/run-with-fresh-code.sh manage-force >> /home/mayongtao/.nodeble-collar/logs/cron.log 2>&1  # nodeble-collar
